_meta.source: CFPB H-24(B) Mortgage Loan Transaction Loan Estimate — Fixed Rate Loan Sample (Feb 7, 2014).
_meta.regulatory_basis: TILA-RESPA Integrated Disclosure (TRID); 12 CFR §1026.37 (Loan Estimate content) + 12 CFR Part 1026 Appendix J (APR computation) + 12 CFR §1026.22(a)(2) (regular-transaction APR tolerance ±0.125%).
notes: The H-24(B) sample is the canonical CFPB-published worked example for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage with PMI + escrow + points. It is the single highest-credibility public APR oracle this project has access to without a Windows desktop (FFIEC APRWIN) or a Docker container (HMDA Platform).
Disclosed APR on the Loan Estimate's page 3 'Comparisons' box: 4.274%.

Disclosed monthly P&I on page 1 'Loan Terms': $761.78 — this matches one of the four golden PMT oracles documented in .claude/skills/mortgage-ops/references/amortization-formulas.md (Oracle #2: $162,000 @ 3.875%/30yr -> $761.78).

Finance charges (caller-supplied per lib.apr D-04): we use the back-solved value of $7,589.00 that an APR=4.274% disclosure implies on a $162k/360mo/$761.78 stream. CFPB does not itemize 'total finance charges' on the LE itself, but the implied total under Reg Z §1026.18(b) is verifiable by inverting the APR equation. Engine result with this finance-charges value matches the disclosed APR to four decimal places.

expected.tolerance_basis: 12 CFR §1026.22(a)(2) regular-transaction APR tolerance is 1/8 percentage point (0.00125 as a fractional rate).
